scripts.build:admin-css:
sass --no-source-map --style=expanded --load-path ../abcnorio-astro/design-tokens/tokens resources/css/admin-tokens.scss resources/css/.admin-tokens.tmp.css && sed -e 's|@abcnorio-design-tokens/fonts/|../fonts/|g' -e 's|rgba(#000, 0.9)|rgba(0,0,0, 0.9)|g' -e 's|--color-grey-dark: \$c_text;|--color-grey-dark: var(--color-text);|g' resources/css/.admin-tokens.tmp.css > resources/css/admin-styles.css && printf '
' >> resources/css/admin-styles.css && cat resources/css/admin-overrides.css >> resources/css/admin-styles.css && rm -f resources/css/.admin-tokens.tmp.css
scripts.build: npm run ingest:components && npm run build:admin-css && wp-scripts build resources/js/index.js --output-path=build
